ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., condo, house, apartment) */,
  "postalcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the property location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the property listing */,
  "floorsize" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "hoa_fee" TEXT /* HOA fee */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Parking information */,
  "community_info" TEXT /* Community information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Real estate agency the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the agent (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the seller is located */,
  "postalcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the seller location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the buyer is located */,
  "postalcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the buyer location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the offer is for */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer making the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_price" TEXT /* Price of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the sale is for */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document is for */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., deed, inspection report) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the zip code belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature is for */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, view) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the photo is for */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the open house is for */,
  "open_house_date" TEXT /* Date of the open house */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
